basic_details.job_title: Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur – Faculty – 4 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur has announced recruitment for 4 Faculty posts on a contractual basis. Candidates with M.Sc./M.Tech qualification and JEE/NEET teaching experience can attend the walk-in interview on 16-06-2026 through the official recruitment notification.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc./M.Tech. in respective subject, Minimum two years of teaching experience in JEE/NEET preparation from reputed Coaching Institutes, Preference to Ph.D. or alumni of IITs/NITs

seo_tags: Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
